case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR VS. DANIEL HAN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY WAH-MEI LEW, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS THIS MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT HAN, DANIEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-18-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
